metadata.name: beta_half_smile
metadata.description: Rates-standard SABR (beta=0.5) smile across five strikes ITM/ATM/OTM with Obloj (2008) z correction. Guards the mixed normal/lognormal branch that was accidentally correct before Task-1.
metadata.source_detail: Hagan et al. (2002) 'Managing Smile Risk', Wilmott Magazine, eq. 2.17b with Obloj (2008) arXiv:0708.0998v2 correction. For beta=0.5: z = (nu/alpha)*f_mid^(1-beta)*ln(F/K) (Obloj corrected); chi(z) = ln((sqrt(1-2*rho*z+z^2)+z-rho)/(1-rho)); correction_term = 1 + (1-beta)^2/24*ln(F/K)^2 + (1-beta)^4/1920*ln(F/K)^4; factor1 = alpha/(f_mid^(1-beta)*correction_term); factor2 = z/chi(z); time_correction uses f_mid (same as Rust): alpha_term=(1-beta)^2/24*alpha^2/f_mid^(2*(1-beta)), rho_term=0.25*rho*beta*nu*alpha/f_mid^(1-beta), nu_term=(2-3*rho^2)*nu^2/24; vol = factor1*factor2*(1+T*time_correction). Derived independently in Python; NOT copied from SABRModel output. Parameters: alpha=0.05, beta=0.5, nu=0.40, rho=-0.10, F=0.05, T=2.0. Manual derivation for K=0.04: f_mid=0.044721359549996, z(Obloj)=0.377512926050753, chi(z)=0.362843340414050, f_mid_beta=0.211474252688113, correction=1.000518758254723, factor1=0.236312813028339, factor2=1.040429529779884, alpha_term=0.000582309, rho_term=-0.001182177, nu_term=0.013133333, time_correction=0.012473465, factor3=1.024946930, vol=0.252029955870294.
